current_objective: Day 5: Production-Grade Observability — COMPLETED. Background worker and Streamlit dashboard are live.

steps_completed.action: Inspected run_agent_a, run_agent_b, run_agent_c, and run_pipeline in agent_pipeline.py
steps_completed.finding: Located all return points and lifecycle hooks needed to inject execution telemetry.

steps_completed.action: Added global execution_telemetry dict and save_telemetry() function to agent_pipeline.py
steps_completed.finding: Telemetry dict tracks agent_a wake times and headlines, agent_b token counts and violations, agent_c score and verdict. Saves to run_history.json.

steps_completed.action: Injected telemetry updates into simulation and real-mode return paths of run_agent_a, run_agent_b, run_agent_c
steps_completed.finding: All three agents now populate the global telemetry on every pipeline run.

steps_completed.action: Refactored run_pipeline to reset telemetry, track violations in agent_b, and call save_telemetry on success and failure. Updated version to v5.0.0
steps_completed.finding: run_history.json is now written after each pipeline run with full stats.

steps_completed.action: Verified telemetry by running agent_pipeline.py --simulate and inspecting run_history.json
steps_completed.finding: run_history.json correctly captured all agent stats including token counts and compliance violations.

steps_completed.action: Created background_worker.py using Python threading and time-loop scheduler
steps_completed.finding: Background worker runs pipeline on a configurable interval (default 5 min), saves background_worker_status.json for dashboard polling.

steps_completed.action: Created dashboard.py using Streamlit with metrics cards, 3-tab layout (Logs, Archive, Charts)
steps_completed.finding: Dashboard shows last wake time, total cycles, accumulated tokens, compliance rate, fleet transaction logs with agent details, newsletter archive browser, and token/score line charts.

steps_completed.action: Installed streamlit 1.58.0 and pandas via pip
Launched dashboard with python -m streamlit run dashboard.py --server.port 8501
steps_completed.finding: Streamlit server confirmed running at http://localhost:8501

steps_completed.action: Wired log_agent_interaction and check_past_issues into simulated and live pipelines, and created a Live Agent Cooperation chat UI in dashboard.py
steps_completed.finding: Conversational agent interactions are now logged and displayed in real-time on a new dashboard tab.

next_step: Commit the Day 5 changes and push to GitHub using /commit-milestone
